name: Armor Stride
short_description: Sir Stepsalot is trapped in the Cursed Forest! Luckily, he has his trusty sword and bomb pouch to fend off dangerous monsters. He will have to travel deeper into the forest fighting monsters and avoiding traps. Our knight can't stay in place for too long though. There's a dark curse chasing him!
detailed_description:
Sir Stepsalot finds himself trapped in the Cursed Forest! Luckily, he has his trusty sword and bomb pouch to fend off dangerous monsters. He will have to travel deeper into the forest fighting monsters and avoiding traps. He may find treasure along the way to sell to the shopkeeper. Our knight can't stay in place for too long though. There's a dark curse following him! It's probably best to stay away.

FEATURES
  • Endless, hand-crafted procedural levels
  • Fight dangerous enemies
  • Soundtrack by RyanAvx
  • Simple Controls - Move in a direction of the enemy to attack!
  • Controller Support

Armor Stride is an endless grid-based runner where you must fight your way through the Cursed Forest and stay away from the Curse.
